name: 2026-04-09 evening: continued crash (snack not eaten)
description: Real data 19:00-21:00 UTC then BG continues falling — she didn't eat the bedtime snack or the reactive nudge suggestion. Dinner spike (10.9) has been absorbed, insulin is still active, nothing incoming to raise BG. Engine should: (1) fire bedtime nudge at ~20:10 UTC, (2) fire reactive nudge at ~20:50 UTC as BG drops through 7.3, (3) after the absorption window expires (~35 min later), escalate to emergency foods as BG drops below hypoFloor (5.0).
